title: Data Manipulation
wikitext:
[[File:MegaMan_Moves_Junk_Data.gif|thumb|center|400px|MegaMan.EXE is able to manipulate data to affect hardware and junk parts in the real world]]

==Summary==
'''Data Manipulation''' is the ability to manipulate computer data for a variety of purposes. While seemingly limited to hacking and misinformation, various characters can make use of it on other planes as they themselves are made of data and can thus manipulate their own forms or those of others in the virtual or physical plane.

==Users==
* [[MegaMan.EXE|Various]], [[ProtoMan.EXE|Net]][[Bass.EXE|Navis]] [[Gregar/Falzar|and other Digital Beings]] ([[Mega Man (Franchise)|Mega Man]])
* Various [[Beelzemon|Digimon]] and [[Yggdrasil (Digimon)|Virtual]] [[Homeostasis|Beings]] ([[Digimon]])
* [[X.A.N.A]] ([[Code Lyoko (Verse)|Code Lyoko]])
* [[Cyborg (Post-Flashpoint)|Cyborg]] and [[Brainiac (Post-Crisis)|Brainiac]] ([[DC Comics]])
* [[White Face]] ([[Imscared]])
